word: H5201 - נָטַר - nâṭar - naw-tar' - Bear grudge

sections.paragraph:
Original: נטר

Transliteration: nâṭar

Phonetic: naw-tar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to keep, keep guard, reserve, maintain
    1. (Qal)
      1. to keep, maintain
      2. to keep, guard

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1356

Part(s) of speech: Verb
